keywords.help: One keyword per line. Supports English, Arabic, and Turkish. Keywords are matched case-insensitively.

sync.success: Catalog synced successfully. {{count}} new tools added.

aiProviders.title: AI Providers
aiProviders.description: Manage tenant-selectable AI provider metadata. Tenants use these providers with their own key unless marked ERP03-managed.

form.name: Provider Name
form.byokHint: When enabled, tenants must provide their own provider key in AI Settings. When disabled, ERP03 manages the connection through a separate entitlement/credits engine.

hints.capabilitiesNone: Start conservative. Enable capabilities only after diagnostics pass.
hints.metadataOnlyTitle: This page stores provider metadata only
hints.metadataOnlyBody: Platform credits credentials and usage caps are not configured here. Use this page to define provider defaults and tenant-facing capabilities.

recommendations.openai: OpenAI works best with the default endpoint and all three capability flags enabled.
recommendations.openaiCompatible: OpenAI-compatible providers usually need a custom endpoint. Keep model sync off unless the provider exposes a reliable /models API.
recommendations.gemini: Enter the provider endpoint only if you are routing Gemini through a compatible gateway. Keep capabilities off until diagnostics confirm support.
recommendations.anthropic: Anthropic should start as metadata only here unless you have a compatible gateway and tested runtime behavior.
recommendations.ollama: Ollama is local. Use the local endpoint and no auth, then enable capabilities only after local diagnostics pass.
recommendations.custom: Custom providers should start with no capabilities enabled. Add only the exact flags your runtime has passed in diagnostics.

aiRuntimeProfiles.title: Platform Global Providers
aiRuntimeProfiles.description: Manage platform provider + model runtimes used by AI Credits mode.

form.identityLocked: Provider and model are fixed after creation. Create a new runtime if you need a different pair.
form.apiKeyHint: Stored encrypted and never returned to the browser.
form.apiKeyReplacePlaceholder: Leave blank to keep current key, or enter a new one
form.apiKeyReplaceHint: Enter a new key only when rotating the stored credential.

aiModels.title: AI Model Profiles
aiModels.description: Manage model trust status, runtime flags, tags, and diagnostic history.

form.runtimeConfigSubtitle: These settings affect how the AI runtime uses this profile. Set data filter and safety policies to pass shell certification.

diagnosticsPanel.title: Run Diagnostics
diagnosticsPanel.subtitle: Test connectivity and model capabilities using a company's AI configuration.

diagnosticsModal.title: Run Diagnostics
diagnosticsModal.apiKeyPlaceholder: Enter your API key for this test
diagnosticsModal.apiKeyHelp: The key is used only for this test and is never stored or logged.
diagnosticsModal.apiKeyFooterNote: Your API key is not stored and is only used for this test.
diagnosticsModal.infoText: Diagnostics test provider connection and model capabilities using YOUR API key. The key is used only for this test and is never stored or logged.
diagnosticsModal.noResults: Click "Run Diagnostics" to test the provider connection.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.disclaimer: ⚠ Certification validates ERP module compatibility. Diagnostics only test connectivity.
certifications.noCerts: No certifications yet. Run shell or manual certification to enable ERP tool access for this model.
certifications.whatIsCertificationDesc: Certification validates that a model profile is safe to use with specific ERP modules like Accounting, Sales, or Inventory. Without certification, the AI runtime blocks tool access for that module.
certifications.whatAreDiagnosticsDesc: Tests provider connection and model capabilities using a tenant's saved settings. This does NOT certify the model for ERP module access.
certifications.shellCertDesc: Shell certification checks structural requirements (tool mode, data filter policy, safety policy). It does NOT run live AI tests. A passing shell cert enables ERP tool access for the selected category.
certifications.noProfileHash: Profile hash not available. Save the profile first.
certifications.manualCertInfo: Record a certification result from an external AI test suite. This does NOT run any automated tests — it registers a result you have verified manually.
certifications.staleTooltip: This certification was run against an older configuration of this profile. The runtime ignores it until you re-run the test on the current config.
certifications.staleBannerBody: This profile was edited after these tests were run, so they no longer apply to the current configuration. The chat runtime ignores stale certifications — re-run them to re-enable ERP tools.
certifications.staleHeroTitle: Certifications no longer match this profile
certifications.staleHeroBody: You edited this profile after running these tests. The chat runtime ignores stale certifications, so tenants on this model currently have no tool access. Re-run certification for each category you want to re-enable.
certifications.confirmExpire: Are you sure you want to expire this certification?

starter.title: Auto initialize modules with Trading Company - Simple
starter.description: Creates the standard chart of accounts, initializes Accounting, Inventory, Sales, and Purchases, links default posting accounts, uses simple direct invoicing, invoice-driven inventory, and blocks negative stock.
starter.inventory: Invoice-driven stock, global average cost, negative stock off
starter.inventoryPeriodic: Periodic stock valuation, global average cost, negative stock off
starter.inventoryInvoiceDriven: Live inventory value on invoices, global average cost, negative stock off
starter.inventoryPerpetual: Perpetual stock valuation with warehouse-level moving average costing
starter.tax: Tax-ready, no hidden legal rate applied
starter.workflowOperational: Operational sales and purchases with receiving and delivery documents
starter.manualDescription: Modules will be installed from the selected bundle, but setup wizards will remain manual.

accountingMode.label: Accounting Mode
accountingMode.locked: Inventory accounting mode is locked after the first posted stock or accounting transaction.
accountingMode.unlocked: You can still change the mode until the first posted stock or accounting transaction.

itemsList.title: Inventory Items
itemsList.subtitle: Search, create, and open item master records used by Sales, Purchases, and Inventory.
itemsList.quickAddHelp: Use this for simple item setup. Open the item card for full accounting, stock, and pricing configuration.
itemsList.emptyDescription: Use search or filters above to load item master records.

itemMaster.activeDesc: Allow this item to be used in transactions

glReconciliation.title: Inventory ↔ GL Reconciliation
glReconciliation.subtitle: Stock sub-ledger value vs General Ledger inventory balances
glReconciliation.help: Compares the inventory sub-ledger (Σ qty × avg cost, grouped by each item's Inventory Asset account) against the General Ledger balance of those accounts. Any difference is costing/posting drift.
glReconciliation.empty: No inventory asset accounts with stock value or GL balance.

status.driftDetected: Drift detected between stock and GL

itemMovement.title: Item Movement
itemMovement.subtitle: Historical movement ledger with running quantity and value
itemMovement.loadFailed: Failed to load item movement report
itemMovement.empty: No item movements match the filters.

stockLevels.title: Stock Levels
stockLevels.subtitle: On-hand quantity and valuation by item or warehouse
stockLevels.empty: No stock levels match the filters.

status.unvaluedNegative: Negative stock has no cost basis

valuation.title: Inventory Valuation
valuation.subtitle: Stock value by item, warehouse, and pricing policy

unsettledCosts.title: Unsettled Costs
unsettledCosts.subtitle: Stock-out movements awaiting cost settlement
unsettledCosts.empty: No unsettled movements match your filters.

transfers.title: Stock Transfers
transfers.subtitle: Move stock between warehouses
transfers.flatHint: Flat: move stock A→B at source cost. No ledger effect.
transfers.valuedHint: Valued: explicit revaluation. The variance posts to the Inventory Revaluation account.
transfers.overIssueHint: Some lines move more than is available in the source warehouse. Negative stock is off, so this can be saved as a draft but not completed until you reduce the quantity or receive stock.
transfers.onlyDraftEdit: Only draft transfers can be edited.
transfers.warehousesRequired: Source and destination warehouses are required.
transfers.warehousesDifferent: Source and destination must be different.
transfers.addLine: Add at least one item line.
transfers.deleteMsg: This removes the draft only. No stock or ledger entries are affected.
transfers.completeMsgValued: This posts the paired stock movements and the valued-transfer revaluation entry.
transfers.completeMsgFlat: This posts the paired stock movements. No accounting entry is created (flat transfer).
transfers.undoMsg: This creates and posts a linked reverse transfer. The original remains in history for audit.
transfers.guardTitle: Can’t complete — stock would go below zero
transfers.guardMsg: This transfer moves more than is available in the source warehouse:
transfers.guardTail: Negative stock is off. Edit the quantity, or keep it as a draft.

revaluations.title: Inventory Revaluations
revaluations.subtitle: Value-only cost correction. Quantity is never changed.
revaluations.postingNotice: Inventory Revaluation never changes quantity. In INVOICE_DRIVEN / PERPETUAL mode, posting creates a balanced GL voucher against the Inventory Revaluation account. In PERIODIC mode, the sub-ledger average updates but no daily Inventory Asset GL voucher is created.

errors.lineRequired: At least one line with positive on-hand quantity is required.

readiness.qty: At least one item with qty
readiness.account: Revaluation account required when GL posting

confirm.title: Post inventory revaluation?
confirm.message: This posts the revaluation and updates the sub-ledger average cost. In INVOICE_DRIVEN / PERPETUAL mode a balanced GL voucher is created against the Inventory Revaluation / Variance account. In PERIODIC mode the sub-ledger updates but no daily GL voucher is created.

dnDetail.salesOrderFieldLabel: Sales Order (optional unless SO is required for stock items)

returnDetail.title: Sales Return
returnDetail.createSubtitle: Customer return document with credit-note or refund settlement.
returnDetail.noDeliveryNoteLines: Selected delivery note has no lines.
returnDetail.noLinesYet: No lines yet — click "Add Line" to start building the return.
returnDetail.restockingFeeNonNegative: Restocking fee value must be a non-negative number.
returnDetail.restockingFeeBeforeInvoice: Restocking fee can only be used for returns that affect invoiced value.
returnDetail.selectOneLine: Select at least one line to return.
returnDetail.returnQtyPositive: Each selected line must have a return quantity greater than 0.
returnDetail.addOneLine: Add at least one item line to the return.
returnDetail.everyLineMustHaveItem: Every line must have an item selected.
returnDetail.everyLineReturnQtyPositive: Every line must have a return quantity greater than 0.
returnDetail.unitPriceNonNegative: Unit price must be a non-negative number on every line.
returnDetail.customerRequired: A customer is required for standalone returns.
returnDetail.invoiceRequired: A posted sales invoice is required for AFTER_INVOICE returns.
returnDetail.deliveryNoteRequired: A posted delivery note is required for BEFORE_INVOICE returns.
returnDetail.createFailed: Failed to create sales return draft.
returnDetail.periodClosed: This accounting period is closed and cannot be overridden.
returnDetail.editHint: Editing header details only. Return lines are fixed once the draft is created.
returnDetail.directReturnHint: No source invoice or delivery note — build the return lines manually below.
returnDetail.sourceLinesHint: Check the lines to return below and adjust quantities as needed. By default every source line is included with full quantity.
returnDetail.directReturnInfo: Direct returns create their own revenue reversal and (for tracked items) stock receipt + COGS reversal entries. Make sure the unit price matches what the customer paid for the item.

ai.welcomeMsg:
### **Welcome to the AI Advisor - Executive Financial Advisor (CFO Advisor)**
I am your intelligent financial advisor connected to the organization's entire ledger and journal vouchers. I can analyze data in real-time and provide instant drafts for reports and vouchers.
ai.analysis1: - **Liquidity & Balances Check**: Analysis of liquidity in BBS Bank and branch cash boxes.
ai.analysis2: - **Collection Risk Management**: Study of AR aging and overdue payments.
ai.analysis3: - **Accounting Vouchers Consultation**: Preparing double-entry drafts and matching assets/taxes according to IFRS standards.
ai.analysis4: Please ask any financial question or try the quick queries below!
ai.quickQueryLiquidityPrompt: Analyze the current cash position in the cash box and bank, and suggest a strategy to manage cash flows.
ai.quickQueryOverduePrompt: Analyze the current aging and overdue invoices of Al-Noor Group customer.
ai.quickQueryDepreciationPrompt: I want a double-entry (Debit/Credit) voucher draft to depreciate computer equipment worth 500,000 SYP using straight-line method.
ai.advisorConnected: Advisor is directly connected to the accounts and invoices of {{companyName}}.
ai.suggestedQueriesDesc: Smart queries ready for the current accounting center for instant verification:
ai.securityStandardsDesc: All calculations and processing are securely performed server-side without exposing API keys to the browser.
ai.errorTitle: ### **Sorry, an error occurred while connecting to the AI server**
ai.errorDesc: We could not fetch the advisor response due to: {{message}}.
ai.errorRetry: Please ensure server stability or try again later.
ai.loading: Analyzing data and calculating double entries...

field.extraBecomesCustomerCredit: The extra becomes a credit on the customer account.
field.extraBecomesVendorCredit: The extra becomes a credit on the vendor account.

validation.positiveAmount: Enter an amount greater than zero.
validation.overpayment: Amount exceeds the outstanding balance. Turn on "Allow over-payment" in settings to record the excess as a party credit.

errorModal.genericServerMessage: {{operation}} failed on the server (HTTP {{status}}). Please retry. If it repeats, send this error reference to support.

openingStockDocuments.legacyOpeningMovementsBody: These movements were recorded through the older direct opening-stock flow, so they do not have Opening Stock Document headers. Review Stock Movements before creating a new opening document to avoid duplicate stock.

errors.NEGATIVE_STOCK_BLOCKED: Can’t issue {{itemLabel}} from warehouse {{warehouseLabel}} — only {{current}} in stock but {{requested}} requested (would leave {{resulting}}). Negative stock is turned off. Receive stock first, or enable negative stock in Inventory Settings.

Name: Name
Service items are non-stock by default.
Base/Purchase/Sales UOM selection is her: Base/Purchase/Sales UOM selection is here; conversion factor setup is in the section below.
Save this item first, then return to Sto: Save this item first, then return to Stock Control to define From UOM, To UOM, and conversion factor.
This From UOM and To UOM conversion alre: This From UOM and To UOM conversion already exists. Update the existing row factor instead.
Live values update from posted stock rec: Live values update from posted stock receipts and sales. They do not replace per-warehouse stock-level costs.
Default unit prices in the pricing curre: Default unit prices in the pricing currency below. Sale price is used as a fallback when no customer price list applies.
This currency acts as the base for all p: This currency acts as the base for all price groups defined above.
No posted movement uses this conversion: No posted movement uses this conversion yet. Applying new factor is direct.
Correction will be applied as stock delt: Correction will be applied as stock delta adjustments. Invoice/payment values stay unchanged.

formsManagement.title: Forms Management — {{module}}
formsManagement.noInstalledTypes: No voucher types installed yet. Pick one from Available below to install.
formsManagement.installedToast: Installed "{{name}}" — {{count}} default form added as locked, inactive.

errors.loadFailed: Could not load forms management data

notEnabled.label: Accounting Not Enabled
notEnabled.message: {{module}} operations will track quantities and documents but will NOT create financial/GL postings.

setupRequired.label: Accounting Enabled - Setup Required
setupRequired.message: The Accounting module is enabled but has not been set up yet. Complete the Accounting setup first, then configure {{module}} financial integration.

pending.label: Financial Integration Pending
pending.message: Accounting is set up but {{module}} account mappings have not been configured. Financial postings will not be created until mappings are set.

active.label: Financial Integration Active
active.message: {{module}} is fully integrated with Accounting. All operations create financial/GL postings.

taxCodes.title: Tax Codes
taxCodes.subtitle: Manage tax rates, account routing, price basis, and purchase tax cost treatment.
taxCodes.lockText: This tax code is used in posted documents. Create a new tax code to change tax treatment.

priceBasis.inclusiveHelp: Inclusive - entered price already includes tax
priceBasis.exclusiveHelp: Exclusive - tax is added on top
priceBasis.help: With 10% tax and price 100, Exclusive totals 110; Inclusive splits 100 into net 90.91 and tax 9.09.

purchaseTreatment.nonRecoverableHelp: Non-recoverable - include purchase tax in item/expense cost
purchaseTreatment.help: Recoverable tax debits the purchase tax account. Non-recoverable tax is capitalized into inventory or expense cost.

messages.invalidRate: Rate % must be a non-negative number.
messages.priceBasisRequired: Price Basis is required. Choose whether entered prices include tax or tax is added on top.

communications.title: Communications
